string.text: A waterproof, well-insulated sleeping bag. Treated with a special compound that repels mutants.
It's impossible to set the explosive charge without an activate remote detonator, or set more than one charge due to technical limitations.
Without a power battery it's impossible to detonate the set charge.
Mineral water is an excellent way to remove radionuclides without harming health, but stalkers usually prefer vodka.

An explosive charge that requires an activate remote detonator for installation. During installation, the detonator and charge are tuned to the same frequency. The package includes a remote detonation device, which is activated when the charges are set and if a battery is present. It's possible to tune multiple charges to the frequency of a single detonator.
A remote detonation device. It's already tuned to the planted explosive device, simply press the button to detonate.
